§6Catalytic Cracking Tower§f

§aYour gateway to cracked oil and beyond — a towering multiblock that breaks down complex fluids into simpler, more valuable ones!§f

The §bCatalytic Cracking Tower§f is a massive §e15-block§f tall multiblock machine that processes oil products using steam. Unlike the Oil Refinery, it has no GUI — simply look at it to see its contents and progress. It processes in §e100mB§f batches, consuming §e200mB§f of steam per batch and producing §e2mB§f of Low-Pressure Steam as a byproduct.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e16×§f Steel Scaffold
§b• §e6×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e12×§f Desh Ingot
§b• §e4×§f Niobium Ingot

§6Operation§f:
§b• Default recipe§f: §e100mB§f Bitumen + §e200mB§f Steam → §e80mB§f Crude Oil + §e20mB§f Aromatic Hydrocarbons.
§b• Key recipe§f: §e100mB§f Crude Oil + §e200mB§f Steam → §e80mB§f Cracked Oil + §e20mB§f Petroleum Gas (the primary cracked oil production route).
§b• Other recipes§f: Process §eDiesel§f, §eKerosene§f, §eIndustrial Oil§f, §eNatural Gas§f, §eBTX§f, and more with steam.
§b• Simple cracking§f: §e100mB§f Kerosene → §e60mB§f Petroleum Gas (only recipe with a single output).

§eTip§f: The cracking tower is essential for §bprogression§f — Cracked Oil feeds into the next stage of refining. The §bRadiolysis Machine§f can perform the same recipes without steam, but requires power instead. Plan your steam production before building this tower!
